metadata.description: Deterministic governance for Claude agents: an independent verifier that refuses a tool call before it runs.

plugins.name: recusal-gate
plugins.description: PreToolUse gate with no model in the decision path: refuses destructive tool calls before they run, even under bypassPermissions. Requires pip install recusal; the POSIX launcher fails closed without it on macOS, Linux, and Windows with Git Bash. On Windows without Git Bash use `recusal init`, which registers a PowerShell-native fail-closed launcher. The plugin version is bound to the exact recusal package version that adjudicates: a mismatch fails closed, so the installed plugin identity names the implementation that decides.
